mapper.insert: /* Point.insertPointHistory */ INSERT INTO TB_POINT_HISTORY ( SOCIAL_ACCOUNT_ID, ORDER_ID, PAYMENT_ID, POINT_TYPE, POINT_AMOUNT, BALANCE_AFTER, DESCRIPTION, CRE_TM ) VALUES ( #{socialAccountId}, #{orderId}, #{paymentId}, #{pointType}, #{pointAmount}, #{balanceAfter}, #{description}, NOW() )
mapper.select: /* Point.selectPointHistories */ SELECT ID AS id, SOCIAL_ACCOUNT_ID AS socialAccountId, ORDER_ID AS orderId, PAYMENT_ID AS paymentId, POINT_TYPE AS pointType, POINT_AMOUNT AS pointAmount, BALANCE_AFTER AS balanceAfter, DESCRIPTION AS description, CRE_TM AS creTm FROM TB_POINT_HISTORY WHERE SOCIAL_ACCOUNT_ID = #{socialAccountId} ORDER BY ID DESC
